creator: george+freebsd@m5p.com
text:
On 09/17/11 10:58, Pawel Pekala wrote:
> After committing this:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/159735
>
> I can't reproduce this issue, can you confirm so I can close this PR?
>
As faw as I can tell, you are running with Java 1.6.  The point of my
bug fix was to run with Java 1.7 installed.  So I don't see any
connection between this bug, which looks to me like problems with
permissions after the package is installed, with my problem, which
was a failure to even install the package.               -- George
